name: Ulanzi L024 40W RGB Portable LED Video Light
description: RGB Full Color 0-359° color range for personalized lighting, offering any shade you desire.

features.Key Features:: RGB full color, 0-359° wide color range. | 50W (overclock) high brightness, CRI 95+, TLCI 96+. | Color temperature 2500K-6500K, stepless dimming. | Built-in 3400mAh battery, DC and Type-C fast charging. | Compact and lightweight, weighing only 490g, easy to carry. | 20 scene light effects.
features.What’s in the box?: 1x 40W RGB | 1x Reflector | 1x Diffusion Dome | 1x Velvet Bag | 1x User Manual
